scripts.dev:cleanup: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $ports=@(3000,3001); foreach ($port in $ports) { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; if (Test-Path 'src/frontend/.next/dev/lock') { Remove-Item 'src/frontend/.next/dev/lock' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
scripts.dev:debug: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:AUTH_DEBUG_SSO='true'; npx next dev src/frontend --webpack"
scripts.dev:sso: node -e "process.env.ENABLE_DEV_BYPASS='false'; process.env.DEV_SESSION_USER_ID=''; const { spawn } = require('node:child_process'); const child = spawn(process.execPath, ['node_modules/next/dist/bin/next', 'dev', 'src/frontend', '--webpack'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: false, env: process.env }); child.on('exit', (code) => process.exit(code ?? 0)); child.on('error', (err) => { console.error(err); process.exit(1); });"
